title: Named Return Values
description: Use named return values to document the purpose of each return variable.
problemStatement:
Return values can be named! Define a function `split(sum int) (x, y int)` where `x = sum * 4 / 9` and `y = sum - x`. Call it with `17` and print the results.

**Requirement:** Use a 'naked' return (just `return` at the end).
hints: Named return parameters are initialized to zero and behave as variables defined at the top of the function.
